title: Additional Features of SQL for Relational Algebra Operations
description: A flowchart illustrating the advanced SQL features that extend its capabilities beyond basic CRUD operations, mapping to core relational algebra concepts.
relationships: Set Operations extend basic SELECT for union, intersection, difference
Join Operations combine data from multiple tables based on conditions
Subqueries allow queries to be nested inside other queries for complex filtering
Aggregate Functions operate on sets of data to return single values, often grouped
Data Control commands manage user permissions and database security
Views provide virtual tables based on stored queries for simplified access
